fields.label: Our positions are based out of our San Francisco office, and have a hybrid employment setup (3-4 days in the office each week). Are you open to this?
fields.value: I am open to relocating to San Francisco
fields.source: preferences.willing_to_travel_pct (>=25%) | NOTE: 'Yes' not literally in options ['I am based in San Francisco', 'I am open to relocating to San Francisco', 'I am not willing to relocate at this time'] | ashby_smart_match(relocation,picked='I am open to relocating to San Francisco')

options.label: I am based in San Francisco
options.value: I am based in San Francisco

options.label: I am open to relocating to San Francisco
options.value: I am open to relocating to San Francisco

options.label: I am not willing to relocate at this time
options.value: I am not willing to relocate at this time

fields.label: Do you require sponsorship now or in the future to work in the United States?
fields.value: I am a US Citizen / Green Card Holder
fields.source: work_authorization.sponsorship_required_* | NOTE: 'No' not literally in options ['I am a US Citizen / Green Card Holder', 'I have an H-1B and will require transfer', 'I have an H-1B, I-140 approved, and will require transfer', 'I have OPT from Academics'] | ashby_smart_match(workauth_citizen_status,picked='I am a US Citizen / Green Card Holder')

options.label: I am a US Citizen / Green Card Holder
options.value: I am a US Citizen / Green Card Holder
